svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="阶段3微前端+Egg" id="stage3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-150" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1040" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="阶段3：微前端 + Egg.js BFF 层（多业务线 / 跨团队协作）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="600" x="220" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="微前端主应用（统一入口）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="子应用1
业务线A（Vue3）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="80" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="子应用2
业务线B（Vue3）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="250" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="子应用3
业务线C（Vue3）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="420" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Egg.js 企业级 BFF 层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="620" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Java + SpringBoot
微服务集群" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="620" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Redis 缓存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="880" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;" value="公司级公共组件库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="80" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="统一工程化体系
